data.content: Fixed remaining c051 transition bug in table/columns UI by teaching beat-columns validNextStates() to honor raw metadata.knotsState when display state is rolled back, include non-terminal escape-hatch states, and avoid presenting raw/display no-op targets; added regression tests in src/lib/__tests__/beat-columns-valid-next-states.test.ts. Validation: worktree bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build; main pushed to origin/main at d5393f1.
